title: Weighted
description: Weighted is a small mod that adds weighted armor and weapons to your game! With its own buffs towards combat.
body:
Weighted adds weighted weaponry and armor. Each item has a set of buffs and debuffs. For example, If you wear the Ankle Weights. You will take significant knockback reduction! (Even better than Netherite!) and you will no longer be effected by Shulkers! But to combat this new found ability. You are significantly slower and you sink in water! But do not worry! You can enchant these boots with Light Footed to remove all of these debuffs and even get a little speed boost!

You can craft these weights with one Netherite Scrap.

Add the weights to sticks in a smiting table to make a Weighted Stick (which can help you craft the weighted sword and axe)

And to make the Ankle Weights you just add one weight to a set of Iron Boots.

This mod is very small and was made in less than a day. There may be bugs and tweaks later on with the updates but I just thought this was a cool small idea to implement.

**Any Issues or Suggestions? Send them here!**  
https://forms.gle/4tQWso6JRzbSB4C69
